_instructions: Hero section. `status` renders as a monospace readout line above the name with a blinking cursor.
name: Ruchira Patil
tagline: Systems that stay up, and stay measurable.
summary: I build reliability-critical services in the Appeals domain at Amazon — shipping features, migrating live case data, and holding the line through on-call. USC master's, two peer-reviewed papers, and a bias for the instrumentation that tells you whether any of it actually works.
